'''Drathul''' was a member of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], and the [[High Prefect]] of the [[Intendant caste]].

==Biography==
[[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] of the [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] ''[[Harla]]'', Drathul agreed to keep [[Nom Anor]] at the forefront of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]], despite his own misgivings. After the murder of [[Yoog Skell]], Drathul was [[Escalation|escalated]] to [[High Prefect]] of the [[Intendant caste]]. However, he endured much embarrassment as Intendants were accused of complicity in the [[Jeedai heresy|''Jeedai'' heresy]], which Nom Anor actually planted. When [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] arrived at [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]], Drathul, a [[Quorealist]], demanded Anor's help in discrediting [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]], but Anor would not help. During the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], Drathul accompanied [[High Priest/Legends|High Priest]] [[Jakan]] and [[Master Shaper]] [[Qelah Kwaad]] to the Well of the [[World Brain]], where they intended to sacrifice [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Harrar]] to the brain. [[Shamed Ones]] broke into the atrium, and Nom Anor strangled Drathul.

==Behind the scenes==
In chapter 39 of ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' (page 422 in the paperback version), the High Priest's name is misspelled "Darthul."
